ideation: This sequence will depict a farmer working, using both arms in a natural, fluid motion.  The first frame will show the arms slightly bent, hands positioned as if holding a tool.  The second frame will showcase one arm extended, perhaps reaching for something. The third frame will show both arms reaching down, potentially planting something. The final frame will show the arms returning to a relaxed, but still active position. This sequence focuses on conveying the actions of a farmer through expressive arm movements.

frames.beat: arms bent, ready to work the soil
left arm reaches out, scanning the field
both arms bend low, planting seeds with care
arms straighten, a moment of rest before the next task
